chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Transfer Application No.S-10 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 3.For hearing of CMA 786/2024 17-05-2024 Mr. Safdar Ali Jogi, Advocate for applicant. ***** Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate has filed power as well as objections on behalf of respondents No.1 to 8. After hearing this application, it is disposed of with consent with direction to learned Appellate Court to hear the parties and decide Civil Appeal No.40 of 2018 till 31st August, 2024 and submit such compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar. During that period, meanwhile, no adjournment shall be granted to either party except on a genuine ground and for the reasons recorded in the order in support of it. This Civil Transfer Application along with listed application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
